title: General Library Resources
content:
Earl S. Richardson Library
Morgan State University

---

LIBRARY CARD REGISTRATION

Register your MSU BearCard as your library card to have access to every available resource, both on and off campus.

---

LIBRARY SERVICES

RESEARCH
- Borrow books and reference materials from our library
- Access materials from other libraries in the University of Maryland Library System
- Interlibrary loan services

READ
- View online collections and periodicals
- Access academic journals and databases
- E-books and digital resources

VISIT
- Special Collections in the Beulah Davis Research Room
- Study spaces and group study rooms
- Computer labs and printing services

WATCH
- Movies, documentaries, and award-winning films on Kanopy
- Educational videos and streaming content

---

AVAILABLE RESOURCES

Databases:
- Academic journals
- Research databases
- Citation tools

Study Spaces:
- Individual study carrels
- Group study rooms (reservable)
- Quiet study areas

Technology:
- Computer workstations
- Printing and copying services
- Scanning services
- WiFi throughout the building

---

LIBRARY HOURS

Check the library website for current hours as they vary by:
- Regular semester
- Finals week
- Breaks and holidays

---

ADDITIONAL SERVICES

- Research assistance from librarians
- Interlibrary loan
- Course reserves
- Citation help
- Research consultations

---

CONTACT AND INFORMATION

Visit the Earl S. Richardson Library website for:
- Current hours
- Room reservations
- Database access
- Contact information
- Chat with a librarian

Website: Check Morgan State University Library website for full details
